projectDescription: An Android mobile application for business management featuring user authentication and a dashboard with planned modules for sales, community, logistics, and reports.
keyFeatures: User registration with username and password
Dashboard menu with Comunidad, Venta, Logistica, and Reporte modules (in development)
Local SQLite database for user storage via BaseDeDatosUsers
In-app links to GitHub, WhatsApp, and Universidad Autónoma del Perú
Edge-to-edge UI using AndroidX EdgeToEdge API
publicApiSurface: activity_registro.enviar(View) — submits registration and passes data to MainActivity
BaseDeDatosUsers — SQLiteOpenHelper managing users table (usuario, password)
